chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تُصَلِّي بِحِيَالِ الرَّجُلِ وَ الرَّجُلِ يُصَلِّي وَ الْمَرْأَةُ بِحِيَالِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – The woman prays Salāt parallel with the man, and the man prays Salāt and the woman is parallel to him

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/71)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/71)
text: الْمَرْأَةِ تُصَلِّي إِلَى جَنْبِ الرَّجُلِ قَرِيباً مِنْهُ فَقَالَ إِذَا كَانَ بَيْنَهُمَا مَوْضِعُ رَحْلٍ فَلَا بَأْسَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad, from Hareyz,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the woman who prays Salāt to the side of the man, near to him. So heasws said: ‘When there was a place between the two of them of one saddle-bag (cubit), so there is no problem’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad from Hariz who has said the following: “I once asked abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman who performs Salah (prayer) on the side of the man nearby. He (the Imam) said, ‘If there is a distance of one Rahl (yard), it is not harmful.
